summary: Excellent audience recording of a legendary Easter‑Sunday show in Irvine with standout China>Rider, Wharf Rat, Space and Black Muddy River performances
review: Fans rave about this 1987 Irvine concert as one of the year’s best, highlighting a tightly‑constructed first set, an explosive second‑set A (China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider, Wharf Rat, Space) and a remarkable Black Muddy River encore. The audience tape is praised as the “best AUD recording” with crystal‑clear sound that lets every nuance of Jerry’s smiling vocals and guitar work shine.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently five‑star praise for both the performance and the audio quality across eight detailed reviews; no negative comments detected.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listeners call it the best AUD tape, noting superb clarity and balance with no reported drop‑outs or muddiness.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as nicely constructed; pre‑drums “Cumberland” jam adds a special touch. Second set A is “off the hook,” and the encore delivers a rare, soaring Black Muddy River.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Smiling all day, stellar vocal moment on "everyone say..." (Wharf Rat), and an almost unprecedented guitar solo on Black Muddy River.
band_member_comments.Drums: Pre‑drums Cumberland jam highlighted as a nice surprise; overall drumming praised as epic.
